title: Hot Death Theatre Powersuit
description: Do you like MONEY? Do you want to be a WINNER? Do you want to feel SUCCESS writhing around in your guts like a panicking tapeworm? Then join multi-award-winning horror-comedy investment specialists and purveyors of high quality troubling imagery, Hot Death Theatre as they unleash their latest sales & motivational-speaking, wealth-generation hybrid event suddenly, without warning and dangerously close to your face and you, too, can go from zero (you) to zeroes (your bank account) overnight!* See you there, champ. *2% chance you'll die - Winner - "Best Alternative Act" - Reykjavik Fringe Festival, 2025 Winner - "Fringe of the Fringe" – Reykjavik Fringe Festival, 2024 (b i r d) Winner - "Fringe of the Fringe" - Gothenburg Fringe Festival, 2025 (b i r d) Shortlisted, "Best Alternative Act" - Leicester Comedy Festival, 2024
content_warnings: Use of fake blood, potentially triggering themes of dark horror, characters in significant distress
